title: The Central Sanskrit Universities Act, 2020
full_text: The Central Sanskrit Universities Act, 2020 केंद्रीय संस्कृत विश्वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 2020 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 202005 Act Number: 05 Enactment Date: 2020-03-25 Act Year: 2020 Short Title: The Central Sanskrit Universities Act, 2020 Hindi Title: केंद्रीय संस्कृत विश्वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 2020 Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 30-04-2020 Schedule 1. Section 38. Disputes as to constitution of authorities and bodies. Section 39. Filling of casual vacancies. Section 40. Proceedings of authorities or bodies not invalidated by vacancies. Section 41.
